inputs.label: EBIT (Earnings Before Interest and Taxes)
inputs.businessContext: The company's operating profit before interest and tax expenses.

label_i18n.es: EBIT (Ganancias antes de intereses e impuestos)

businessContext_i18n.en: The company's operating profit before interest and tax expenses.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Şirketin faiz ve vergi giderlerinden önceki faaliyet karı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Betriebsgewinn des Unternehmens vor Zins- und Steueraufwendungen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Bénéfice d'exploitation de l'entreprise avant charges d'intérêts et d'impôts.
businessContext_i18n.es: Utilidad operativa de la empresa antes de gastos por intereses e impuestos.

inputs.label: Tax Rate
inputs.businessContext: Effective corporate tax rate as a percentage (e.g., 30 for 30%).

businessContext_i18n.en: Effective corporate tax rate as a percentage (e.g., 30 for 30%).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Efektif kurumlar vergisi oranı yüzde olarak (örneğin, %30 için 30).
businessContext_i18n.de: Effektiver Körperschaftsteuersatz in Prozent (z. B. 30 für 30%).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux d'imposition effectif sur les sociétés en pourcentage (ex. 30 pour 30%).
businessContext_i18n.es: Tasa impositiva corporativa efectiva como porcentaje (ej., 30 para 30%).

inputs.label: Depreciation & Amortization
inputs.businessContext: Non-cash expenses from depreciation and amortization of assets.

businessContext_i18n.en: Non-cash expenses from depreciation and amortization of assets.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Amortisman ve itfa payları gibi nakit dışı giderler.
businessContext_i18n.de: Nicht zahlungswirksame Aufwendungen aus Abschreibungen auf Vermögenswerte.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Charges non monétaires provenant de l'amortissement des actifs.
businessContext_i18n.es: Gastos no monetarios por depreciación y amortización de activos.

inputs.label: Capital Expenditures
inputs.businessContext: Cash spent on acquiring or maintaining fixed assets (CapEx).

businessContext_i18n.en: Cash spent on acquiring or maintaining fixed assets (CapEx).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sabit varlıkların edinimi veya bakımı için harcanan nakit (CapEx).
businessContext_i18n.de: Ausgaben für den Erwerb oder die Instandhaltung von Anlagevermögen (CapEx).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Trésorerie dépensée pour l'acquisition ou la maintenance d'actifs fixes (CapEx).
businessContext_i18n.es: Efectivo gastado en adquirir o mantener activos fijos (CapEx).

inputs.label: Change in Net Working Capital
inputs.businessContext: Increase in net working capital (current assets minus current liabilities) that consumes cash.

label_i18n.fr: Variation du besoin en fonds de roulement
label_i18n.es: Cambio en el capital de trabajo neto

businessContext_i18n.en: Increase in net working capital (current assets minus current liabilities) that consumes cash.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Nakit tüketen net işletme sermayesindeki (dönen varlıklar eksi kısa vadeli yükümlülükler) artış.
businessContext_i18n.de: Erhöhung des Nettoumlaufvermögens (Umlaufvermögen abzüglich kurzfristiger Verbindlichkeiten), die Liquidität bindet.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Augmentation du besoin en fonds de roulement (actifs courants moins passifs courants) qui consomme de la trésorerie.
businessContext_i18n.es: Aumento en el capital de trabajo neto (activo corriente menos pasivo corriente) que consume efectivo.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
